name: AWS IAM Successful Attachment of Policy to a Role
description: Detects a change in access permissions where an IAM policy was successfully attached to a specific IAM role. Attackers who gain valid credentials or abuse existing access may attach permissive policies to escalate their privileges and gain broader control over resources.

rules.name: AWS IAM Successful Attachment of Policy to a Role

author: Yash Verma & Christopher Ordonez
